podcasts.name: Davie Fogarty
podcasts.title: You don’t want money, you want validation
podcasts.transcript: Most business owners don't even want a business. They just want reassurance that they are worth something. Maybe the girl didn't want to kiss them in school. Maybe mom and dad didn't pay enough attention to them. So, they start a business. They think that money will solve that gap in their life. And you'll go and you'll bleed and you'll fight and you'll damage your mental health to create a business only to find out that that was the truth all along. But, here's the beautiful thing. When you get to the end of that path, you'll realize something else. You'll realize that the money, the business, the way that people look at you isn't anything. It's actually just the fact that it's you versus you and you can change anything in your life for you. It's a way that you can free yourself from society as well as your own mental barriers and prisons that have been pushed onto you from others.
